dialogueChunks.intro: The pieces finally fit together. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_was} exactly what {quest_ally} suspected: a remnant of something far older than any living memory.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: With what you've uncovered, we can now read the warnings and understand what {quest_threat_the} truly was. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} preserved because you had the patience to look deeper when others would have walked away.
dialogueChunks.outro: Knowledge is its own reward, but you've earned the settlement's gratitude as well. {target_npc} wants to continue studying your findings.

dialogueChunks.intro: We've learned more than we knew before, but {quest_focus_the} still holds secrets we can't crack. Some mysteries don't yield all at once.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} has documented everything you found. Even partial understanding of {quest_threat_the} gives us an advantage we didn't have. The {enemy_type} won't find the sites so welcoming now that we know to watch them.
dialogueChunks.outro: You didn't solve the whole puzzle, but you gave us the edge pieces. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} safer for your efforts, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: What you found changes everything we thought we knew. {quest_focus_The} wasn't just ancient: it was active, still functioning after all these centuries.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is stunned. The implications are staggering: {quest_threat_the} is something far older than anyone expected, more connected to this land than we understood. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_was} never in true danger: it was protecting them all along.
dialogueChunks.outro: You've uncovered something remarkable, {player_name}. Word of this will spread far, and scholars will want to hear your account firsthand.
